description: Composition Purple and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, stitch detailing, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest with brand embroidery, and a curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron High on casual style and designed with fashionable cuts, this check shirt from highlander makes for a perfect denim wear. Crafted from soft cotton and offering a flattering silhouette, this shirt is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with jeans, throw over a blazer and slip into suede boots or sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
